description: Create a complex GitHub Actions workflow named ci that automates various tasks on push to the master branch. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: delete_previous_release to delete the previous Development Release, draft_release to create a new release, and two build jobs, mxe64 and mxe32, for Windows 64-bit and 32-bit builds respectively using MXE cross build. Each job performs specific steps like setting up MSYS2, running the build, and uploading release assets.
